leadText: The Diamond Bottle (Japanese: ダイヤボトル Diamond Bottle) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Diamond Bottle serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A diamond-patterned bottle that's small, light, and even comes with a cup. The detachable strap makes it handy for walking around with.
